metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1810
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.3: "These experiments highlighted a neuronal activity-induced potentiation of GKAP-DLC2 interaction in postsynaptic elements." shown with BRET microscopy.. Experimental description: - Cultured neurons are mouse species ("Hippocampal neuronal primary cultures were prepared from embryonic day 17.5 mice and ....")
- Species of overexpressed protein is not mentioned in the paper ("The DLC2-pCMV-SPORT6 plasmid was purchased from Source BioScience Geneservice Nottingham, UK)."). Author contacted (julie.perroy@igf.cnrs.fr)) for species information on construct (dd 3/11/2017 Pim). Answer:

"the DLC2 we used in this paper is the HUMAN DLC2.
Do not hesitate if I can help you more.
Best,
Julie"

checks.label: OWL Consistency
